data.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "Post-review remedy: reopened after an unjustified force-close; work is complete and all 9 children are closed+certified. Force-transition to in_progress to CLOSE THROUGH the completion gate (which now returns PASS) and earn a real signature. Plan-review skipped by user authorization — work already delivered, not being (re)designed.".
